mnemonics.title: Thread Safety Difference
mnemonics.content: StringBuffer = Safe Builder (Synchronized), StringBuilder = Speedy Builder (Not Synchronized)

mnemonics.title: Default Capacity
mnemonics.content: Sweet 16 - both start with 16 characters capacity

mnemonics.title: Java Version Introduction
mnemonics.content: StringBuilder came in Java 5 - '5' looks like 'S' for Speed
